name: game-hub
description: Microfrontend-based 1v1 gaming platform with Tic Tac Toe, Dots and Boxes, Snake & Ladder, and Leaderboard

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd container && npm install && cd ../tic-tac-toe && npm install && cd ../dots-and-boxes && npm install && cd ../snake-ladder && npm install && cd ../leaderboard && npm install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:container" "npm run start:tictactoe" "npm run start:dotsandboxes" "npm run start:snakeladder" "npm run start:leaderboard"
scripts.build:all: cd container && npm run build && cd ../tic-tac-toe && npm run build && cd ../dots-and-boxes && npm run build && cd ../snake-ladder && npm run build && cd ../leaderboard && npm run build

author: Game Hub Team
